CREATE TABLE test_division (id INT, value DECIMAL(10, 2));
CREATE TABLE test_floats (id INT, value FLOAT);
INSERT INTO test_floats (id, value) VALUES (1, 5.5), (2, 2.5), (3, NULL), (4, -1.1);
SELECT id, value, value / 2 FROM test_division;
SELECT id, value, value / 2.0 FROM test_floats;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_division) / value AS average_division FROM test_division;
SELECT a.id, a.value / b.value FROM test_division a JOIN test_division b ON a.id <> b.id;
SELECT id, CASE WHEN value <> 0 THEN 5.0 / value ELSE NULL END AS safe_division FROM test_division;
SELECT id, value, (SELECT SUM(value) FROM test_floats WHERE id != 1) / value AS dependent_division FROM test_floats;
